page_content:
Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in IMDM490.

Restriction: Must be in the Immersive Media Design program.

IMDM498 Special Topics in Immersive Media (1-3 Credits)

Special topics in current and emerging areas of Immersive Media Design. Restriction: Permission of Immersive Media Design program. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
